theme.archetype: 3 + 4 Hybrid (Vibrant Neo-Brutalist polished into High-End Editorial)
theme.description: A bold, vibrant, friendly yet highly polished hybrid theme. Combines the approachability of pastel/neo-brutalism with the crisp contrast and authority of Swiss design. It feels premium and portfolio-grade, shedding generic SaaS purple-gradients for strong editorial typography and confident, unapologetic color blocking.

patterns.page_entrance: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, transition: { duration: 0.5, ease: 'snappy' }

chat_bubbles.sent: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm px-4 py-2.5 max-w-[75%] shadow-sm
chat_bubbles.received: bg-muted text-foreground rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-4 py-2.5 max-w-[75%] border border-border/50
chat_bubbles.grouping: First message in group has full radius, last message has sharp corner pointing to sender

composer.wrapper: flex items-end gap-2 p-4 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-border
composer.input: min-h-[44px] max-h-[120px] bg-muted/50 border-transparent focus-visible:ring-primary rounded-xl px-4 py-3 resize-none
composer.send_button: h-11 w-11 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-md hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center shrink-0

sidebar_list.presence_dot: absolute bottom-0 right-0 h-3.5 w-3.5 rounded-full ring-2 ring-background bg-secondary

call_window.fullscreen: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center
call_window.pip: absolute bottom-8 right-8 w-48 h-72 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl border border-border
call_window.controls: absolute bottom-12 flex items-center gap-6 p-4 rounded-full bg-background/20 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10

landing_bento.card: bg-card border border-border rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors

implementation_plan.title: Setup & Theming Core
implementation_plan.description: Initialize Tailwind config with HSL variables. Inject Epilogue and Plus Jakarta Sans fonts. Build the CSS variable architecture to support robust Light/Dark mode switching following OS preference. Set up Shadcn UI globals.

implementation_plan.title: Base Layout & Navigation
implementation_plan.description: Implement the core application shell (Sidebar + Main Content Area + Context Panel). Build out the sliding panel logic and global state for theme toggling. Add Framer Motion context providers.

implementation_plan.title: Marketing & Auth Pages
implementation_plan.description: Develop the Landing Page featuring an asymmetric Bento grid, animated hero text, and smooth scrolling. Implement Login and Register split-screen pages with vibrant art panels and custom Shadcn input fields.

implementation_plan.title: Main Chat Interface
implementation_plan.description: Build the 3-column chat UI. Create highly-polished chat bubble components (sent/received with border-radius grouping). Implement the composer textarea with auto-resize, and the sidebar list with presence indicators.

implementation_plan.title: Micro-interactions & Polish
implementation_plan.description: Integrate Framer Motion for entering message bubbles, a 3-dot typing indicator, hover/active states on all interactive elements, and sonner toasts for notifications.

implementation_plan.title: Call Window & Overlays
implementation_plan.description: Construct the full-screen audio/video Call Window with a PiP (Picture-in-Picture) self-view, glassmorphic floating control buttons, and the top-right incoming call floating card.

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark grain texture, suitable for premium dark mode backgrounds or landing page hero overlay.

social_context.description: Young man smiling looking at smartphone in modern office setting. Great for landing page imagery.

avatars.description: Woman with dreadlocks, creative lighting. Profile picture.
Close up of person with long hair, warm lighting. Profile picture.
Boy in blue denim jacket. Profile picture.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items) MUST use data-testid attributes with role-based kebab-case naming (e.g., data-testid='chat-send-button', data-testid='theme-toggle-button').
